decision_problem_id.description: Stable identifier for the decision problem.

title.description: Short human-readable title for the problem.

analysis_type.description: The public contract assumes a net-benefit-first analysis frame.

currency.description: Currency code or symbol used for cost outputs.

willingness_to_pay.description: Decision threshold used to calculate net benefit.

outcome_names.description: Ordered list of outcome labels used by the problem.

interventions.description: Candidate interventions compared by the problem.
